notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Zack Gelof singles on a ground ball to first baseman Spencer Horwitz. Nick Kurtz scores. Tyler Soderstrom scores. Jacob Wilson scores. Zack Gelof to 2nd. Zack Gelof advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by first baseman Spencer Horwitz.

notableEvents.label: Carlos Cortes GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Carlos Cortes grounds into a double play, shortstop Jared Triolo to first baseman Spencer Horwitz. Jacob Wilson out at 2nd. Carlos Cortes out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Endy Rodríguez challenged (pitch result), call on the field was overturned: Henry Bolte steals (6) 2nd base.

notableEvents.label: Alika Williams pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Alika Williams doubles (5) on a line drive to left fielder Bryan Reynolds.

notableEvents.label: Max Muncy pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Max Muncy grounds out, shortstop Jared Triolo to first baseman Spencer Horwitz.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Zack Gelof singles on a ground ball to first baseman Spencer Horwitz. Nick Kurtz scores. Tyler Soderstrom scores. Jacob Wilson scores. Zack Gelof to 2nd. Zack Gelof advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by first baseman Spencer Horwitz.
